title: Add hardcoded single order cancellation as proof of concept

requirements.text: In the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo), add a new public update function `cancelOneOrderTest()` that calls `cancelOrder()` on the ICDex canister at 'jgxow-pqaaa-aaaar-qahaq-cai' with a single hardcoded order ID (e.g., orderId = 0). This function must be completely self-contained and must not modify any existing functions including tradingLoop(). It serves only as a proof of concept that the cancelOrder() call compiles and executes without budget_exceeded errors.

quotes: implemente apenas o cancelamento seletivo de uma única ordem hardcoded

acceptanceCriteria: A new public update function `cancelOneOrderTest()` exists in backend/main.mo
The function calls cancelOrder() on the ICDex canister with a single hardcoded order ID
No existing functions (tradingLoop, startBot, stopBot, etc.) are modified
The canister compiles successfully without budget_exceeded errors
The function can be called via dfx canister call without runtime errors

constraints: Do not modify any existing functions in backend/main.mo
Do not touch any frontend files
Keep the change to the absolute minimum: only add the new cancelOneOrderTest() function
Do not add any comparison logic, grid calculations, or loop iterations
nonGoals: Comparing open orders against new grid levels
